title: Taxi Split Airport to Grebaštica | Fixed €90 Transfer | TAXI Antonio

schema.name: Taxi Split Airport to Grebaštica

offers.description: One-way private transfer from Split Airport to Grebaštica, per car for up to 4 passengers. Return 180 euros.

mainEntity.name: How far is Grebaštica from Split Airport, and how long is the drive?

acceptedAnswer.text: The drive from Split Airport to Grebaštica is around 46 km and takes roughly 55 min in normal traffic, a little longer at busy times in summer. I plan the pickup so a slow patch never leaves you rushed.

mainEntity.name: Where do you meet me at Split Airport?

acceptedAnswer.text: In the arrivals hall, just after baggage reclaim, holding a sign with your name. I help with the luggage and walk you to the car.

mainEntity.name: What if my flight is delayed?

acceptedAnswer.text: No problem. I track your flight in real time and adjust the pickup to the actual landing, with no extra charge for the wait.

mainEntity.name: How much is the transfer from Split Airport to Grebaštica?

acceptedAnswer.text: A fixed 90 per car for up to 4 passengers, one way, tolls and luggage included. A return trip is 180.

mainEntity.name: How far in advance should I book?

acceptedAnswer.text: At least 2 hours ahead so I can plan around your flight. For a same-day pickup after a sudden change, call or WhatsApp me and I will help if I can.
